text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm at the cafeteria having lunch...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's the matter, Oguri?! It's not like ya to
sigh durin' a meal...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, apparently they're going to model a plush
toy after me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...That's it? Sounds like good news to me. Psh, got
me all worried for nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, it's too early to celebrate. They just asked to
take my measurements tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But... I don't know if I can do it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Do wha—Oh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bahaha! Skippin' meals for a day's not gonna
change nothin'! Just go as you are now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: As I am now? Then...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Like what?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what else is there? Oh, that's it. Just give me
a moment.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, what do you think? Didn't I get changed
quickly?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Uh, I'm not sure what exactly's goin' on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, dong...

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The student-held Carrot Ranger show will begin
shortly. All performers and audience members,
please gather in front of the outdoor stage.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, easy there, Tiger! Where ya goin'?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Please let me wear that costume!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I said no already! Pearl already agreed to play the
baddie!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! What da heck are ya doin'?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Please, Tama, help me out! Tell her I need to
practice being a plushie!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Practice... bein' a plushie? Hold up, Oguri. Don't
tell me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya seriously mixed up fuzzy costumes for fuzzy
plushies?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I... thought they needed my measurements so I'd
fit inside...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya doink head! Da only thing goin' into da plush
toy is cotton!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh. That's a relief. Then... that means I don't have
to hold back for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrooowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So what if my clothes burst at the seams? I'll start
off light with about... thirty large rice bowls!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Th-that's way too much food...
